Petition For Authority To Establish Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Jan-07-2008 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Kelly and Sylvius Von Saucken for Carolyn Kahn (Petitioner).

The Court was informed that the waiver of notice to the son had been filed last Friday. The Court stated that the revised Special Needs Trust addressed the matter of the dollar amount and details. The Court granted the petition. Counsel will submit the order. The matter is set for status on the transfer of venue to February 6, 2008.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.
